headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Westinghouse Air Brake, Raises Price Target to $300
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Tami Zakaria   maintains Westinghouse Air Brake (NYSE:WAB) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $290 to $300.
